meta.title: DrugCard — AI-powered pharmacovigilance automation
meta.description: Streamline your drug safety routines: global and local literature monitoring and regulatory intelligence with DrugCard.

hero.headline: AI-powered pharmacovigilance automation for global and local literature monitoring and regulatory intelligence.
hero.tagline: Streamline your drug safety routines with us

pressures.heading: Pharmacovigilance evolving rapidly. We understand your pressures
pressures.intro: What has changed in the last 3-5 years and how this affected the industry

aiCompetition.title: AI-Competition
aiCompetition.text: Growth has slowed down as new aggressive entrants with AI-tech shake the status quo.

techAge.title: Tech / digital age
techAge.text: New heavy investments have longer paybacks while the change cycles have shrinked.

audits.title: Audits / regulatory pressure
audits.text: The number of audits has increased. More and more non-compliance cases and mitigations.

peopleCosts.title: People costs are rising
peopleCosts.text: Good people leaving increases the retention costs, while the new talent costs more. Heavy investments in staff training and onboarding new talents.

marketStress.title: New pinches strike harder and harder
marketStress.text: People are stressed and it is hard to predict their buying behaviors. Adverse reactions become more frequent.

newMarkets.title: Entering new markets
newMarkets.text: Entering new markets has become longer, less predictable, and more costly.

requirements.heading: Global pressures dictate new requirements to drug safety processes
requirements.intro: With DrugCard these requirements will be under control:

testimonials.subtitle: Trusted customers that can provide everything you need to generate awareness, drive traffic, connect

cros.title: CROs can manage more PV projects and improve screening results
cros.text: When pharma outsource PV processes to CROs, they expect the highest quality and maximum search results to ensure full compliance with regulatory requirements. CROs can no longer guarantee the best results if they continue to read journals from cover to cover manually. Progressive CROs continuously discover innovative methods and tools to make their pharma customers fully compliant and satisfied.

mahs.title: In-house local literature screening for MAHs
mahs.text: Outsourcing of literature screening to CROs has become widespread in the last 5-7 years. However, we at DrugCard strongly believe that literature screening could be done more effectively in-house.

freelancers.title: Free up time for other activities
freelancers.text: With DrugCard, freelancers providing literature screening and other outsourcing services can save up to 70% of their precious time.

cta.heading: Enhance Your Pharmacovigilance
cta.text: Unleash the power of AI, automation and traceability with DrugCard
